explanations.1: This shows curl is attempting to connect to a local server running on port 8001 (127.0.0.1 is your own computer).
explanations.8: This is curl noting that the server doesn't support HTTP connection reuse, meaning each request needs a fresh connection.
explanations.15: The connection is being closed after the response; this happens when the server or client doesn't want to keep the connection open for future requests.
